use_cases: Full-screen hero section with video background and overlay text for SaaS landing pages
Email capture form integrated into hero for lead generation
Responsive navbar with dropdown navigation for multi-section websites
Theme toggle (light/dark) support for user preference
Video play/pause controls for media-rich product showcases
ai_summary: A comprehensive hero section component featuring a full-screen video background with play/pause controls, overlaid headline and description text, and an email subscription form. Includes a responsive navbar with dropdown menus, mobile hamburger menu, and light/dark theme toggle support. Designed as a complete landing page entry point for SaaS and digital product websites, combining video media, navigation, and conversion-focused form elements in a single composite component.
